faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my East Rutherford home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool or natural fiber clothing, silky webbing in closets or drawers, small beige or gold-colored moths flying around your home, and larvae casings on fabrics. You may also notice adult moths near wardrobes or storage areas. Our technicians provide free inspections to confirm the presence of clothes moths and assess the extent of the infestation.

faqs.question: What is included in your clothes moth control service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive clothes moth control includes a thorough inspection of all affected areas, identification of moth species, targeted treatment of infested fabrics and storage areas, larvae elimination, pheromone traps for monitoring, and preventative measures to stop future infestations. We also provide detailed guidance on cleaning and protecting your garments and follow-up visits to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in East Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in East Rutherford range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and number of treatments required. Smaller apartments or single-room treatments start at the lower end, while larger homes with extensive infestations require more comprehensive treatment plans. We provide free estimates and customized pricing based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does it take to eliminate a clothes moth infestation?
faqs.answer: Most clothes moth infestations require 2-4 treatments over 6-8 weeks to completely eliminate all life stages, including eggs, larvae, and adults. The timeline depends on the severity of the infestation and cooperation with preparation requirements like cleaning and laundering affected items. Our technicians will provide a detailed treatment schedule and timeline during your initial inspection to set proper expectations.
